case_title: OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY, LLC VS. JOHN O. KNACHEL et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY, LLC

DECLARATION RE DAILY RENTAL VALUE: $44.92 FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY, LLC
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT KNACHEL, JOHN O.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNACHEL, JOHN O. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 205 GARCES DR. S.F. CA. 94132, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KNACHEL, JOHN O.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KNACHEL, JOHN O.
